statement.markdown: Given an array representing a max heap, perform a deletion operation from the root (maximum element) and then heapify the array.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be a list of integers representing the array.
statement.outputFormat: Output should be a list of integers after the deletion operation and heapification.
statement.notes: The array is initially a max heap, and all elements are unique.

examples.explanation: The array [8, 5, 3, 1, 9] represents a max heap. Performing a deletion operation on the root (8) and then heapifying the array gives us the array [7, 9, 3, 1].
If the input array has only one element, no deletion operation is performed.
